name: David Spergel
summary: Astrophysicist who chaired NASA's UAP Independent Study Team.
profileSummary: Astrophysicist who chaired NASA's UAP Independent Study Team.
background: Astrophysicist and president of the Simons Foundation.
inclusionNote: Included because NASA formally appointed him chair of the UAP Independent Study Team and he helped present the team's public findings and recommendations.
